body.title: Memory palace as source of truth — tickets/decisions/slates/rules/skills/history all live in theigors/* tree
body.result: Shape-lock doc: lab/design_docs/palace_migration/shape_lock_2026-04-20.md. Two-layer model (canonical in memories table as first-class rows w/ parent=*_ROOT under PR_IGORS_PROJECT; navigable index in memory_palace as pointers). No new memory types — FACTUAL/REFERENCE/PROCEDURAL + metadata tags. Echo-on-close timing. Echoes: queue.json, decisions_log.dsb, slate.txt, 3× SKILL.md locations, CLAUDE.md shim, GitHub. Invariants + open questions documented. Child tickets (T-tickets/decisions/slates/skills-into-palace-subtree + T-sync-on-close-not-dayend) unblocked. 5dfd5c34.
body.description:
Akien 2026-04-20: move every project-scoped artifact into the memory palace tree under theigors/* as canonical source of truth. Files on disk and GitHub become echoes updated by palace_sync, not primary storage.

## Proposed tree shape
theigors/
  rules/* (EXISTS) — canonical; CLAUDE.md shrinks to thin shim that reaches into DB
  tickets/T-xxx (new subtree — replaces queue.json as canonical)
  decisions/D-xxx (new — echoed to decisions log via palace_sync)
  slates/YYYYMMDD (new — daily discussion tree nodes)
  skills/<skill-name> (new — replaces ~/.claude/skills/ + lab/claudecode/cc_skills/ drift)
  history (pointer node → git log, claude_chat_logs/, infra.sessions)
PR_IGORS_PROJECT (existing facia) stays as the activation root pointing at all of the above.

## Open storage question (resolve in T-tickets-into-palace-subtree first)
Two candidate homes:
(a) memory_palace table (path/title/content/pointers) — signpost tree shape, would need extension to hold operational data
(b) memories table with parent_id=PR_IGORS_PROJECT (or a new tickets-root under it), memory_type=FACTUAL, kind:ticket tag — first-class memory graph nodes, respects 'no new memory types' rule
Bias: (b) for canonical storage; (a) for a navigable signpost index that points at (b). Resolve cleanly in the tickets sub-ticket.

## Scope boundary
This is the EPIC. Concrete sprint work happens in child tickets: T-rules-canonical-db-first, T-tickets-into-palace-subtree, T-decisions-into-palace-subtree, T-slates-into-palace-subtree, T-skills-into-palace-subtree, T-sync-on-close-not-dayend.

## Provenance
Akien 2026-04-20 post-/fixit dictation. Paired with the workflow overhaul batch from earlier this session.
